history.text: Hungarian conquest of the Carpathian Basin appears in Hungary's historical record.
Principality of Hungary ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Christian Kingdom ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Golden Bull of 1222 limited royal power and became a landmark constitutional document.
Battle of Mohács became a defining conflict in Hungary's political story.
Liberation of Buda restored control after occupation.
The Revolution of 1848 reshaped Hungary's political life.
Austria-Hungary appears in Hungary's historical record.

worthSeeing.title: Budapest Thermal Baths:
worthSeeing.text: Szechenyi and Gellert baths in Neo-Baroque splendour, fed by natural hot springs.

worthSeeing.title: Danube Panorama:
worthSeeing.text: Parliament building reflected in the river is one of Europe's most iconic views.

worthSeeing.title: Lake Balaton:
worthSeeing.text: Central Europe's largest lake, a summer resort for Hungarians and visitors alike.
